final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the Changan Origin Q06 automotive launch announcement.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation cover design, modern automotive marketing aesthetic, subtle gradient overlays
Subject: bold headline "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" as central focal point, with elegant subheading placeholder below
Composition: centered typography with generous breathing room, landscape orientation optimized for 16:9 presentation slide
Scene/backdrop: ethereal abstract background suggesting forward motion and innovation — soft light rays, subtle particle effects, translucent layers creating depth without distraction
Lighting/mood: soft diffused ambient light from upper left, creating gentle glow around text, professional and aspirational mood
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as base, electric blue or silver as accent for tech-forward automotive feel, white for text legibility
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must remain legible when projected; background must not compete with headline readability; suitable for corporate presentation use
Avoid: cluttered composition, overly saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark, 3D car render unless specified
